news.title: IBM (NYSE:IBM) Stock Price Sinks 25% After Early Results Shock Investors
news.summary: IBM (NYSE:IBM) reported its worst single-day share price move in company history, with the stock falling 25% after preliminary second-quarter 2026 figures were released. The company cited an industry-wide shift in enterprise tech budgets away from software and mainframe projects toward supply-constrained AI hardware such as servers, storage, and memory. news.title: IBM stock plunges over 20% on preliminary Q2 results: What to know
news.summary: IBM (IBM) stock is plunging upwards of 20% in Tuesday's pre-market trading after releasing weaker-than-expected preliminary second quarter earnings results. Market Catalysts Host Julie Hyman is joined by Yahoo Finance Tech Editor Dan Howley to discuss IBM's stock reaction to these results. IBM is scheduled to release its full second quarter figures on Wednesday, July 22.
